name: Genesis AI Corp.
description: Genesis AI Corp. is a Canada-based technology company focused on developing and commercializing artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning technologies. The company is actively building a proprietary AI platform designed to optimize and analyze complex geospatial data, with initial applications targeting the mining, exploration, and forestry sectors. By leveraging advanced machine learning algorithms, Genesis AI aims to provide predictive modeling and data-driven insights to improve resource discovery and management.
